chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Constitution Petition No. D- 5246 of 2025 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For order on CMA No. 21990/25 (U/A) 2. For orders as to maintainability of main petition. 29.10.2025 Ms. Zahrah Sehr Vayani, advocate for Petitioner. 1. Urgency granted. 2. Learned counsel, under instructions, does not press this petition, which is dismissed as not pressed. Judge Judge Ayaz p.s.
